points_en: In the early 1970s, India faced a severe economic crisis due to the Bangladesh war, millions of refugees, and the US stopping all aid.
Prices of essential commodities increased rapidly (inflation), leading to high unemployment and immense hardship for the common people.
In January 1974, students in Gujarat started an agitation against rising prices, food scarcity, and corruption, leading to the imposition of President's rule.
In March 1974, students in Bihar launched a similar movement and invited Jayaprakash Narayan to lead it.
JP demanded the dismissal of the Congress government and called for a 'Total Revolution'.
points_hi: 1970 के दशक में भारत को आर्थिक संकट का सामना करना पड़ा।
बिहार में आंदोलन हुआ और जेपी को बुलाया गया।
जेपी ने 'संपूर्ण क्रांति' का आह्वान किया।
